com.pdftools
Class NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE

java.lang.Object
  com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
Enclosing class:
NativeLibrary
public static class NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
extends java.lang.Object

The destination mode

Field Summary
static int eDestModeFit
          "Fit" The view is such that the whole page is visible.
static int eDestModeFitB
          "FitB" The view is such that the page's bounding box is visible.
static int eDestModeFitBH
          "FitBH" top The view is top-aligned with top and shows the whole width of the page's bounding box.
static int eDestModeFitBV
          "FitBV" left The view is left-aligned with left and shows the whole height of the page's bounding box.
static int eDestModeFitH
          "FitH" top The view is top-aligned with top and shows the whole page width.
static int eDestModeFitR
          "FitR" left, bottom, right, top The view contains the rectangle specified the two coordinates (left, bottom) and (right, bottom).
static int eDestModeFitV
          "FitV" left The view is left-aligned with left and shows the whole page height.
static int eDestModeXYZ
          "XYZ" left, top, zoom The upper left corner of the view is positioned at the coordinate (left, top) with the given zoom factor.
 
Constructor Summary
NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE()
           
 
Method Summary
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Field Detail

eDestModeXYZ

public static final int eDestModeXYZ
"XYZ" left, top, zoom

The upper left corner of the view is positioned at the coordinate (left, top) with the given zoom factor.

eDestModeFit

public static final int eDestModeFit
"Fit"

The view is such that the whole page is visible.

"FitH" top

The view is top-aligned with top and shows the whole page width.

The view is left-aligned with left and shows the whole page height.

The view contains the rectangle specified the two coordinates (left, bottom) and (right, bottom).
